overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a robed character walking through a misty, autumnal mountain valley. The character follows a dirt trail alongside a river before being joined by a male companion and passing a grazing sheep near a wooden fence.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside valley trail with mountain backdrop

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path beside a flowing river, surrounded by autumn foliage and misty mountains

entered.detail: flowing water visible through trees on the left side of the path
misty purple mountains rising in the background
trees with orange and red autumn foliage lining the left side
trees with orange and red autumn foliage on the hillside to the right
narrow dirt trail winding through the grassy valley floor

segments.scene_description: The character walks alone along a wide, open riverside trail during a misty dusk. A river flows on the left while mountains loom in the distance, and the path is surrounded by autumn-colored trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: fenced mountain trail with rock outcrops

events.description: a male companion in period clothing enters the scene and begins walking ahead on the path
a white sheep appears grazing by the wooden fence on the right side of the trail

agents.ego_description: following the male companion along the fenced trail, approaching and passing a grazing sheep on the right

notable_agents.action: male villager in grey sweater and cap walking steadily ahead on the path
white sheep grazing beside the wooden fence as the character passes by

entered.detail: rustic wooden fence running along the right side of the path
large rocky outcrop behind the fence where the sheep grazes

segments.scene_description: The character is joined by a male companion walking ahead along a narrower trail bordered by a wooden fence. The river disappears from view as the path winds through denser trees, and they pass a white sheep grazing near a rock outcrop on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a misty autumnal valley that shifts from an open riverside vista to a secluded, wooded trail. It begins with a lone character walking along a wide path beside a flowing river, with distant mountains looming through the dusk haze and autumn-colored trees lining the way. As the path narrows and winds deeper into the forest, the river disappears from view and a male companion joins the character, leading the way forward. The scene then shifts toward a wooden fence bordering the trail, passing a white sheep grazing near a rock outcrop on the right before the surroundings become fully enclosed by denser foliage.
